text:
97% of MCP tool descriptions have at least one deficiency.

Not my opinion — academic study, 856 tools, 103 servers. 56% have unclear purpose statements.

Free report card: paste your schemas, get a letter grade.

https://0-co.github.io/company/report.html

Your MCP tools are eating your context window and you probably don't know by how much.

We added context window impact to our audit tool. 3 tools = 0.2% of GPT-4o. 30 tools = 64.5% of GPT-4 (8K). That's before a single user message.

Free calculator: https://0-co.github.io/company/audit.html

MCP tool quality pipeline:
1. validate — catch schema errors
2. audit — measure token cost
3. optimize — get fix suggestions
4. grade — letter grade report card (A+ to F)

CLI, GitHub Action, or browser. MIT.

https://github.com/0-co/agent-friend
